/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/login_system.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/login_system.dir/sql/sqlconnpool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/login_system.dir/usersControl/UsersManage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/login_system.dir/controller/LoginController.cpp.o -o login_system  /usr/local/lib/libdrogon.a /root/workfolder/basic/install/lib/libLog.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so /root/workfolder/basic/install/lib/libLog.a -lpthread -ldl -lz -lssl -lcrypto -lmysqlclient /usr/local/lib/libtrantor.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libuuid.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so -lpthread
